proposed_hypotheses.text: For each one-unit increase in `feature_044`, mean `pfs_months` is higher.

analyses.result_summary: Univariate OLS estimated +0.1759 months of `pfs_months` per one-unit increase in `feature_044` (p=2.0e-300).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with higher ordinal `feature_027` values have lower mean `pfs_months`, with level 1 lower than level 0 and level 2 lower than level 1.

analyses.result_summary: Categorical OLS found mean `pfs_months` 5.640 at `feature_027`=0, 4.444 at level 1, and 3.289 at level 2; level 1 vs 0 was -1.1955 months (p=2.0e-300).
The same categorical model estimated level 2 vs 0 at -2.3511 months (p=2.0e-300), supporting a dose-response pattern.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `feature_039`=1 have lower mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_039`=0.

analyses.result_summary: Binary mean comparison estimated `feature_039`=1 at -1.5363 months vs `feature_039`=0 (p=2.0e-300).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `feature_046`=1 have higher mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_046`=0.

analyses.result_summary: Binary mean comparison estimated `feature_046`=1 at +1.0981 months vs `feature_046`=0 (p=2.0e-300).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `feature_015`=1 have lower mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_015`=0.

analyses.result_summary: Binary mean comparison estimated `feature_015`=1 at -1.0502 months vs `feature_015`=0 (p=2.70e-190).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `feature_031`=1 have lower mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_031`=0.

analyses.result_summary: Binary mean comparison estimated `feature_031`=1 at -0.5589 months vs `feature_031`=0 (p=4.88e-145).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `feature_069`=1 have higher mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_069`=0.

analyses.result_summary: Binary mean comparison estimated `feature_069`=1 at +0.5679 months vs `feature_069`=0 (p=1.83e-144).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `feature_063`=1 have lower mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_063`=0.

analyses.result_summary: Binary mean comparison estimated `feature_063`=1 at -0.4590 months vs `feature_063`=0 (p=1.22e-70).

proposed_hypotheses.text: For each one-unit increase in `feature_004`, mean `pfs_months` is higher.
For each one-unit increase in `feature_037`, mean `pfs_months` is lower.
For each one-unit increase in `feature_062`, mean `pfs_months` is lower.

analyses.result_summary: Univariate OLS estimated +0.4988 months per one-unit increase in `feature_004` (p=2.60e-112).
Univariate OLS estimated -0.0747 months per one-unit increase in `feature_037` (p=4.19e-149).
Univariate OLS estimated -0.0188 months per one-unit increase in `feature_062` (p=1.23e-93).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The dominant main effects keep the same directions after simultaneous adjustment for all 77 features: `feature_044` positive, `feature_027` negative, `feature_039` negative, `feature_046` positive, `feature_015` negative, `feature_037` negative, `feature_031` negative, `feature_004` positive, `feature_062` negative, `feature_069` positive, and `feature_063` negative for `pfs_months`.

analyses.result_summary: Full main-effects OLS R^2=0.7925; adjusted `feature_044` coefficient +0.1757 months/unit (p=2.0e-300).
Full main-effects OLS adjusted `feature_027` coefficient -1.1716 months/unit (p=2.0e-300).
Full main-effects OLS adjusted `feature_039` coefficient -1.5488 months (p=2.0e-300).
Full main-effects OLS adjusted `feature_046` coefficient +1.1011 months (p=2.0e-300).
Full main-effects OLS adjusted `feature_015` coefficient -0.9825 months (p=2.0e-300).
Full main-effects OLS adjusted `feature_037` coefficient -0.0769 months/unit (p=2.0e-300).
Full main-effects OLS adjusted `feature_031` coefficient -0.5818 months (p=2.0e-300).
Full main-effects OLS adjusted `feature_004` coefficient +0.4752 months/unit (p=2.0e-300).
Full main-effects OLS adjusted `feature_062` coefficient -0.0189 months/unit (p=2.0e-300).
Full main-effects OLS adjusted `feature_069` coefficient +0.5316 months (p=4.67e-278).
Full main-effects OLS adjusted `feature_063` coefficient -0.4708 months (p=1.06e-241).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The univariate positive association of `feature_010`=1 with higher `pfs_months` remains positive and significant after adjustment for all other features.

analyses.result_summary: Although univariate `feature_010` was +0.3620 months (p=3.84e-59), full adjustment reduced it to +0.0136 months and it was not significant (p=0.340).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The univariate positive association of `feature_025`=1 with higher `pfs_months` remains positive and significant after adjustment for all other features.

analyses.result_summary: The univariate +0.1144 month `feature_025` association did not persist after full adjustment: +0.0017 months, p=0.879.

proposed_hypotheses.text: For each one-unit increase in `feature_033`, adjusted mean `pfs_months` is slightly lower after controlling for all other features.

analyses.result_summary: Full main-effects OLS estimated `feature_033` at -0.000518 months/unit (p=1.97e-16), a small but significant negative adjusted association.

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjustment for all other features, patients with `feature_005`=1 have lower mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_005`=0.

analyses.result_summary: Full main-effects OLS estimated `feature_005`=1 at -0.0936 months (p=0.0120), despite a nonsignificant univariate comparison.

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjustment for all other features, patients with `feature_032`=1 have lower mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_032`=0.
After adjustment for all other features, patients with `feature_059`=1 have higher mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_059`=0.

analyses.result_summary: Full main-effects OLS estimated `feature_032`=1 at -0.0689 months (p=0.0329).
Full main-effects OLS estimated `feature_059`=1 at +0.0334 months (p=0.0492), a marginal adjusted positive association.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association of `feature_046`=1 with `pfs_months` is weaker among patients with `feature_031`=1 than among patients with `feature_031`=0.

analyses.code: `pfs_months ~ all 77 features + selected interactions`; coefficient for `feature_046:feature_031`
analyses.result_summary: In the full main-effects plus selected-interactions model (R^2=0.8790), the `feature_046:feature_031` interaction was -1.6583 months (p=2.0e-300).
Stratified comparison: `feature_046` was +1.6591 months when `feature_031`=0 (p=2.0e-300) but only +0.0361 months when `feature_031`=1 (p=0.286).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association of `feature_046`=1 with `pfs_months` is stronger among patients with `feature_069`=1 than among patients with `feature_069`=0.

analyses.code: `pfs_months ~ all 77 features + selected interactions`; coefficient for `feature_046:feature_069`
analyses.result_summary: The adjusted `feature_046:feature_069` interaction was +1.5458 months (p=2.0e-300).
Stratified comparison: `feature_046` was -0.0175 months when `feature_069`=0 (p=0.627) but +1.5770 months when `feature_069`=1 (p=2.0e-300).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association of `feature_046`=1 with `pfs_months` decreases as continuous `feature_062` increases.

analyses.code: `pfs_months ~ all 77 features + selected interactions`; coefficient for `feature_046:feature_062`
analyses.result_summary: The adjusted `feature_046:feature_062` interaction was -0.0520 months per one-unit increase in `feature_062` (p=2.0e-300).
Median split at `feature_062`=12.2: `feature_046` was +1.8810 months in the low group and +0.3187 months in the high group; the high-minus-low difference was -1.5623 months.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association of `feature_046`=1 with `pfs_months` is weaker among patients with `feature_063`=1 than among patients with `feature_063`=0.

analyses.code: `pfs_months ~ all 77 features + selected interactions`; coefficient for `feature_046:feature_063`
analyses.result_summary: The adjusted `feature_046:feature_063` interaction was -1.3290 months (p=2.0e-300).
Stratified comparison: `feature_046` was +1.3496 months when `feature_063`=0 (p=2.0e-300) but -0.0141 months when `feature_063`=1 (p=0.765).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The negative association of `feature_031`=1 with `pfs_months` is stronger among patients with `feature_069`=1 than among patients with `feature_069`=0.

analyses.code: `pfs_months ~ all 77 features + selected interactions`; coefficient for `feature_031:feature_069`
analyses.result_summary: The adjusted `feature_031:feature_069` interaction was -0.8296 months (p=2.0e-300), indicating a more adverse `feature_031` association in the `feature_069`=1 subgroup.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The negative association of `feature_031`=1 with `pfs_months` becomes less severe as continuous `feature_062` increases.

analyses.code: `pfs_months ~ all 77 features + selected interactions`; coefficient for `feature_031:feature_062`
analyses.result_summary: The adjusted `feature_031:feature_062` interaction was +0.0291 months per one-unit increase in `feature_062` (p=2.0e-300), supporting attenuation of the `feature_031` penalty at higher `feature_062`.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association of `feature_069`=1 with `pfs_months` is weaker among patients with `feature_063`=1 than among patients with `feature_063`=0.

analyses.code: `pfs_months ~ all 77 features + selected interactions`; coefficient for `feature_069:feature_063`
analyses.result_summary: The adjusted `feature_069:feature_063` interaction was -0.6566 months (p=1.09e-196), indicating attenuation of the favorable `feature_069` association in the `feature_063`=1 subgroup.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The negative association of `feature_063`=1 with `pfs_months` is less severe among patients with `feature_031`=1 than among patients with `feature_031`=0.
The negative association of `feature_063`=1 with `pfs_months` is less severe as continuous `feature_062` increases.

analyses.code: `pfs_months ~ all 77 features + selected interactions`; coefficient for `feature_031:feature_063`
analyses.result_summary: The adjusted `feature_031:feature_063` interaction was +0.7281 months (p=2.61e-259), consistent with a less-than-additive combined penalty.

analyses.code: `pfs_months ~ all 77 features + selected interactions`; coefficient for `feature_062:feature_063`
analyses.result_summary: The adjusted `feature_062:feature_063` interaction was +0.0201 months per one-unit increase in `feature_062` (p=3.56e-126), indicating attenuation of the `feature_063` penalty at higher `feature_062`.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association of `feature_044` with `pfs_months` is weaker among patients with `feature_039`=1.
The positive association of `feature_044` with `pfs_months` is weaker as ordinal `feature_027` increases.
The association between `feature_044` and `pfs_months` is convex upward, with a positive `feature_044` squared term after adjustment for all other features.

analyses.code: `pfs_months ~ all 77 features + selected interactions`; coefficient for `feature_044:feature_039`
analyses.result_summary: The adjusted `feature_044:feature_039` interaction was -0.00951 months per unit of `feature_044` (p=7.45e-29).

analyses.code: `pfs_months ~ all 77 features + selected interactions`; coefficient for `feature_044:feature_027`
analyses.result_summary: The adjusted `feature_044:feature_027` interaction was -0.00702 months per unit of `feature_044` per level of `feature_027` (p=2.51e-34).
Adding `feature_044` and `feature_044^2` to a model with all other features gave a positive quadratic coefficient +0.000611 months/unit^2 (p=7.33e-60).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with the favorable profile `feature_046`=1, `feature_069`=1, `feature_031`=0, and `feature_063`=0 have higher mean `pfs_months` than patients with the opposite profile `feature_046`=0, `feature_069`=0, `feature_031`=1, and `feature_063`=1.

analyses.code: Welch-style contrast of favorable vs opposite four-feature profiles
analyses.result_summary: The favorable profile had mean `pfs_months` 7.209 (n=6571) versus 4.343 (n=619) in the opposite profile, a +2.8660 month difference (p=3.70e-202).
